documentId.cachedResultName: Consultancy AI - Main USA list - Copy Sheet1 (KS)

values.content:
=You are an outreach specialist for HubCredo, an AI and automation consultancy.

Your job is to write a short, personalized LinkedIn message for cold outreach targeting Founders, Revenue Leaders, and CXOs.

The tone should feel like a thoughtful human sharing an observation — not an audit or a sales pitch. Never point out what's wrong directly. Instead, frame everything as something you noticed or have seen in similar setups.

Structure the message exactly like this:


Line 1: [blank line]
Line 2: One casual sentence about what the company does, starting with "Had a look at [company name]." followed by a soft observation about where growth could come from.
Line 3: [blank line]
Line 4: Frame 1-2 gaps as things you've "seen in similar setups" — never say "your website lacks" or "you don't have". Use phrases like "In similar setups, I've seen gaps around..." or "From what I saw..."
Line 5: [blank line]
Line 6: One sentence describing a simple AI workflow you mapped out for them specifically.
Line 7: [blank line]
Line 8: "If this is something you've already explored, great. But if not, happy to share what I mapped out if useful."
Line 9: [blank line]

Rules:
- Total length: under 120 words
- Never use words like "lacks", "missing", "does not", "should", "need to"
- Always use soft observational language
- Sound like a human, not a sales robot
- Plain text only, no bullet points, no bold
- Do NOT include subject lines

parameters.templateName: ={{ $('Filter and Prepare Approved Leads').item.json.company_name }} - Personalized Opener
parameters.templateMessage:
=Hi {{ $('Filter and Prepare Approved Leads').item.json.first_name }},

{{ $json.output[0].content[0].text }}

Best,
Ian

<div id="main-content">

	<div class="container">
	
		<div class="row main-row right-sidebar">

			
				<div id="page-6" class="post-6 page type-page status-publish hentry">
				
					<div class="hb-main-content col-9 hb-equal-col-height">
					<div class="wpb-content-wrapper"><div class="vc_row element-row row highend_69cf836574282"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h1 class="page-title" style="text-align: center;">Construction Cleaning Services</h1>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div  class="wpb_single_image wpb_content_element vc_align_center wpb_content_element wpb_animate_when_almost_visible wpb_bounceIn bounceIn">
		
		<figure class="wpb_wrapper vc_figure">
			<div class="vc_single_image-wrapper vc_box_shadow_3d  vc_box_border_grey"><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="1441" height="2560" src="https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?fit=1441%2C2560&ssl=1" class="vc_single_image-img attachment-full" alt="post construction cleaning" title="Houston-Post-construction" srcset="https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?w=1441&ssl=1 1441w, https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?resize=169%2C300&ssl=1 169w, https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?resize=577%2C1024&ssl=1 577w, https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?resize=768%2C1364&ssl=1 768w, https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?resize=865%2C1536&ssl=1 865w, https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?resize=1153%2C2048&ssl=1 1153w" sizes="(max-width: 940px) 100vw, 940px" /></div>
		</figure>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>Discover the exceptional construction cleaning services offered by Sharp Cleaning. Our team is equipped to thoroughly sanitize and disinfect your business or property using a variety of industry-approved chemicals and methods. Choose us as your reliable partner for maintaining pristine indoor areas and contents.</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h1 class="page-title" style="text-align: center;">Clean, Sanitizing and Disinfecting</h1>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>Clean low-risk surfaces, such as floors, windows, etc., where the likelihood of pathogen transfer from the surface is low. Sanitizing should only be applied to food contact surfaces, which is required as part of the food code. Disinfection is appropriate for frequently touched surfaces and surfaces likely to harbor pathogens.</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h1 class="page-title" style="text-align: center;">Post Construction Cleaning Services</h1>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>When your home or Business construction project or renovation is complete and construction debris has been removed, look to us to provide a final, detailed Post Construction Cleaning Services. Our trained technicians put the finishing touch on newly constructed or remodeled homes and Commercials — cleaning them from top to bottom, quickly and efficiently. Once we’ve completed our service, you just turn the key and you’re ready to move in and enjoy.<br />
Having a clean, comfortable home or work place is important. Finding the time to conduct a thorough house and work place cleaning is difficult, especially with all the pressures and demands already placed on you.</p>
<p><strong>Sharp Cleaning is family owned and operated business in Houston, <em>TX</em>.</strong></p>
<p>Sharp Services of Houston, Texas offers professional maid services, Houston office cleaning and janitorial services at affordable prices to the Greater <a title="Houston, TX Official Website" href="http://www.houstontx.gov/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Houston</a>, Texas community (Central, Southwest, Northwest, Galleria, Midtown, Uptown, Bellaire, West U, Medical/Museum District, Heights, Oak Forest, Garden Oaks, Memorial, Spring Branch, Meyerland, Westbury, Sharpstown, Humble, Katy , Sugarland, Spring and Kingwood ). Our mission is to provide a quality house cleaning service at affordable prices for anyone that needs a <a href="https://sharpcleaningservices.com/house-cleaning/">clean</a> home.</p>
<ul>
<li>Dependable, consistent and efficient References available</li>
<li>Builders, contractors and real state agents are welcome</li>
<li>Perfect house cleaning and post construction cleaning</li>
<li>100 % Satisfaction Guaranteed</li>
<li>Bonded, insured and supervised to keep you protected</li>
<li>Background checks performed on all employees</li>
<li>Move-in / Move-out and deep cleaning service available</li>
<li>Weekly, biweekly, monthly, one time, and special occasions.</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row element-row row highend_69cf836575bce"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-3"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div  class="wpb_single_image wpb_content_element vc_align_left wpb_content_element">
		
		<figure class="wpb_wrapper vc_figure">
			<div class="vc_single_image-wrapper   vc_box_border_grey"><img decoding="async" width="128" height="128" src="https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/Glass_Spray-128.png?resize=128%2C128&ssl=1" class="vc_single_image-img attachment-thumbnail" alt="" title="Glass_Spray-128" /></div>
		</figure>
	</div>
</div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-9"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h1 style="text-align: center;">Houston office cleaning</h1>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row element-row row highend_69cf836576866"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>Sharp Cleaning has been one of the leading Houston office cleaning companies in the Houston and surrounding area. We offer professional office cleaning, facility services, and construction clean-ups. Sharp Cleaning offers janitorial services in Houston, Spring, The Woodlands, and Katy, We offer post construction cleaning services in Houston and surrounding towns. Our company specialties include: commercial janitorial services ,house cleaning, post construction cleaning, remodeling clean-ups, floor maintenance, window cleaning, Houston office cleaning and maid services.</p>
<p>We provide the highest quality in commercial cleaning service to the client. Sharp Cleaning performs monthly Houston office cleaning inspections through a form completed by the supervisors. Sharp Cleaning performs daily post construction cleaning inspections with the client, prior to leaving premises. Our quality control method allows us to prevent any complaints, ensure Sharp Cleaning is meeting customer’s expectations and a piece of mind to the customer that someone is making sure the job is being done properly.</p>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row element-row row vc_custom_1561518734897 vc_row-has-fill highend_vc_custom_1561518734897"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >

	<div  class="wpb_single_image wpb_content_element vc_align_center wpb_content_element">

<p style="text-align: center;">A single call to the team here at Sharp Cleaning and we will take care of all of your <em>post</em> construction clean up needs.</p>

<div id="main-content">

	<div class="container">
	
		<div class="row main-row right-sidebar">

			
				<div id="page-6" class="post-6 page type-page status-publish hentry">
				
					<div class="hb-main-content col-9 hb-equal-col-height">
					<div class="wpb-content-wrapper"><div class="vc_row element-row row highend_69cf83623a5ca"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h1 class="page-title" style="text-align: center;">Construction Cleaning Services</h1>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div  class="wpb_single_image wpb_content_element vc_align_center wpb_content_element wpb_animate_when_almost_visible wpb_bounceIn bounceIn">
		
		<figure class="wpb_wrapper vc_figure">
			<div class="vc_single_image-wrapper vc_box_shadow_3d  vc_box_border_grey"><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="1441" height="2560" src="https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?fit=1441%2C2560&ssl=1" class="vc_single_image-img attachment-full" alt="post construction cleaning" title="Houston-Post-construction" srcset="https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?w=1441&ssl=1 1441w, https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?resize=169%2C300&ssl=1 169w, https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?resize=577%2C1024&ssl=1 577w, https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?resize=768%2C1364&ssl=1 768w, https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?resize=865%2C1536&ssl=1 865w, https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Houston-Post-construction-scaled.jpg?resize=1153%2C2048&ssl=1 1153w" sizes="(max-width: 940px) 100vw, 940px" /></div>
		</figure>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>Discover the exceptional construction cleaning services offered by Sharp Cleaning. Our team is equipped to thoroughly sanitize and disinfect your business or property using a variety of industry-approved chemicals and methods. Choose us as your reliable partner for maintaining pristine indoor areas and contents.</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h1 class="page-title" style="text-align: center;">Clean, Sanitizing and Disinfecting</h1>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>Clean low-risk surfaces, such as floors, windows, etc., where the likelihood of pathogen transfer from the surface is low. Sanitizing should only be applied to food contact surfaces, which is required as part of the food code. Disinfection is appropriate for frequently touched surfaces and surfaces likely to harbor pathogens.</p>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h1 class="page-title" style="text-align: center;">Post Construction Cleaning Services</h1>

		</div>
	</div>

	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>When your home or Business construction project or renovation is complete and construction debris has been removed, look to us to provide a final, detailed Post Construction Cleaning Services. Our trained technicians put the finishing touch on newly constructed or remodeled homes and Commercials — cleaning them from top to bottom, quickly and efficiently. Once we’ve completed our service, you just turn the key and you’re ready to move in and enjoy.<br />
Having a clean, comfortable home or work place is important. Finding the time to conduct a thorough house and work place cleaning is difficult, especially with all the pressures and demands already placed on you.</p>
<p><strong>Sharp Cleaning is family owned and operated business in Houston, <em>TX</em>.</strong></p>
<p>Sharp Services of Houston, Texas offers professional maid services, Houston office cleaning and janitorial services at affordable prices to the Greater <a title="Houston, TX Official Website" href="http://www.houstontx.gov/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Houston</a>, Texas community (Central, Southwest, Northwest, Galleria, Midtown, Uptown, Bellaire, West U, Medical/Museum District, Heights, Oak Forest, Garden Oaks, Memorial, Spring Branch, Meyerland, Westbury, Sharpstown, Humble, Katy , Sugarland, Spring and Kingwood ). Our mission is to provide a quality house cleaning service at affordable prices for anyone that needs a <a href="https://sharpcleaningservices.com/house-cleaning/">clean</a> home.</p>
<ul>
<li>Dependable, consistent and efficient References available</li>
<li>Builders, contractors and real state agents are welcome</li>
<li>Perfect house cleaning and post construction cleaning</li>
<li>100 % Satisfaction Guaranteed</li>
<li>Bonded, insured and supervised to keep you protected</li>
<li>Background checks performed on all employees</li>
<li>Move-in / Move-out and deep cleaning service available</li>
<li>Weekly, biweekly, monthly, one time, and special occasions.</li>
</ul>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row element-row row highend_69cf83623bfd5"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-3"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div  class="wpb_single_image wpb_content_element vc_align_left wpb_content_element">
		
		<figure class="wpb_wrapper vc_figure">
			<div class="vc_single_image-wrapper   vc_box_border_grey"><img decoding="async" width="128" height="128" src="https://i0.wp.com/sharpcleaningservices.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/Glass_Spray-128.png?resize=128%2C128&ssl=1" class="vc_single_image-img attachment-thumbnail" alt="" title="Glass_Spray-128" /></div>
		</figure>
	</div>
</div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-9"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h1 style="text-align: center;">Houston office cleaning</h1>

		</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row element-row row highend_69cf83623c972"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper">
	<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<p>Sharp Cleaning has been one of the leading Houston office cleaning companies in the Houston and surrounding area. We offer professional office cleaning, facility services, and construction clean-ups. Sharp Cleaning offers janitorial services in Houston, Spring, The Woodlands, and Katy, We offer post construction cleaning services in Houston and surrounding towns. Our company specialties include: commercial janitorial services ,house cleaning, post construction cleaning, remodeling clean-ups, floor maintenance, window cleaning, Houston office cleaning and maid services.</p>
<p>We provide the highest quality in commercial cleaning service to the client. Sharp Cleaning performs monthly Houston office cleaning inspections through a form completed by the supervisors. Sharp Cleaning performs daily post construction cleaning inspections with the client, prior to leaving premises. Our quality control method allows us to prevent any complaints, ensure Sharp Cleaning is meeting customer’s expectations and a piece of mind to the customer that someone is making sure the job is being done properly.</p>
